bronze_sword.name: Bronze Sword
bronze_sword.desc: A simple bronze sword. +1 Strength when equipped. Damage: 1d4

iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
iron_sword.desc: A basic iron sword. +2 Strength when equipped. Damage: 1d6

steel_sword.name: Steel Sword
steel_sword.desc: A well-forged steel sword. +3 Strength when equipped. Damage: 1d8

silver_sword.name: Silver Sword
silver_sword.desc: A blessed silver sword. +2 Strength, +1 Magical Defence. Damage: 1d8. Extra damage vs undead. GRANTS: Undead Bane.

flame_blade.name: Flame Blade
flame_blade.desc: A magical sword wreathed in flames. +3 Strength, +1 Magic Power. Attacks may burn enemies. Damage: 1d12 GRANTS: Burn On Hit.

frost_sword.name: Frost Sword
frost_sword.desc: An ice-enchanted blade. +3 Strength, +1 Magic Power. Damage: 1d10. Attacks may freeze enemies. GRANTS: Freeze On Hit.

wind_blade.name: Wind Blade
wind_blade.desc: A sword light as air. +2 Strength, +3 Speed. Damage: 1d8. GRANTS: Wind Slash (20ft wind blade — 1d6 slashing; push target 10ft on hit).

obsidian_blade.name: Obsidian Blade
obsidian_blade.desc: A razor-sharp obsidian blade. +4 Strength, +1 Speed. Damage: 1d10. Causes bleeding wounds.

dragon_blade.name: Dragon Blade
dragon_blade.desc: Forged from dragon scales. +4 Strength, +3 Magic Power, +1 Physical Defence. Damage: 4d12. GRANTS: Dragon Fire (+1d6 fire; 75% Burn on hit).

bronze_dagger.name: Bronze Dagger
bronze_dagger.desc: A basic bronze dagger. +1 Speed when equipped. Damage: 1d4

iron_dagger.name: Iron Dagger
iron_dagger.desc: A sturdy iron dagger. +1 Speed when equipped. Damage: 1d6

main_gauche.name: Main Gauche
main_gauche.desc: A parrying dagger for the off-hand. +1 Speed, +1 Physical Defence. Damage: 1d4. Equip off-hand with Dual Wield and a main-hand dagger. GRANTS: Parry Bonus.

silver_dagger.name: Silver Dagger
silver_dagger.desc: A blessed silver dagger. +2 Speed, +1 Magical Defence. Damage: 1d8. Extra damage vs undead. GRANTS: Undead Bane.

poison_dagger.name: Poison Dagger
poison_dagger.desc: A venomous dagger. +2 Speed. Damage: 1d8. Attacks may poison enemies. GRANTS: Poison On Hit.

shadow_dagger.name: Shadow Dagger
shadow_dagger.desc: A dagger forged from shadow. +2 Speed, +1 Magic Power. Damage: 1d8. GRANTS: Stealth Strike (first attack from hidden: +2 Accuracy, +1d6 damage).

assassin_blade.name: Assassin's Blade
assassin_blade.desc: A deadly assassin's weapon. +3 Speed, +1 Strength. Damage: 2d6. GRANTS: Critical Strike (crit on 19–20; +1 weapon damage die on crit).

void_dagger.name: Void Dagger
void_dagger.desc: A dagger from the void realm. +3 Speed, +2 Magic Power. Damage: 1d10. GRANTS: Phase Strike (ignore 3 Physical Defence and 3 Magical Defence on this attack).

shadow_fang.name: Shadow Fang
shadow_fang.desc: A dagger forged in shadows. +4 Speed, +2 Magic Power. Damage: 2d6. GRANTS: Shadow Step (Action: teleport up to 30ft in dim light or darkness).

temporal_blade.name: Temporal Blade
temporal_blade.desc: A blade that cuts through time. +4 Speed, +2 Magic Power. Damage: 2d10. GRANTS: Time Strike (once per scene: extra weapon attack after this hit lands).

training_bow.name: Training Bow
training_bow.desc: A simple training bow. +1 Speed when equipped. Damage: 1d4

hunting_bow.name: Hunting Bow
hunting_bow.desc: A reliable hunting bow. +2 Speed when equipped. Damage: 1d6

crossbow.name: Crossbow
crossbow.desc: A mechanical crossbow. +1 Strength, +1 Speed. Piercing shots.

composite_bow.name: Composite Bow
composite_bow.desc: A reinforced composite bow. +2 Speed, +1 Strength when equipped. Damage: 1d8. 1 enchantment slot.

lightning_bow.name: Lightning Bow
lightning_bow.desc: A bow that crackles with electricity. +2 Speed, +2 Magic Power. Damage: 1d10. Attacks may shock enemies. GRANTS: Shock On Hit.

elvish_bow.name: Elvish Bow
elvish_bow.desc: An elegant elvish bow. +3 Speed, +1 Magic Power. Damage: 1d10. GRANTS: Nature Blessing (+2 Accuracy, +1 Magic Power outdoors for 8 turns; heal 1 HP at start of outdoor turns).

crystal_bow.name: Crystal Bow
crystal_bow.desc: A bow carved from pure crystal. +3 Speed, +2 Magic Power. Damage: 1d12. Shoots light arrows. GRANTS: Piercing Light.

storm_bow.name: Storm Bow
storm_bow.desc: A bow that commands storms. +3 Speed, +2 Magic Power. Damage: 2d6. Arrows become lightning. GRANTS: Lightning Arrows.

celestial_bow.name: Celestial Bow
celestial_bow.desc: A bow crafted from starlight. +4 Speed, +3 Magic Power. Damage: 2d8. GRANTS: Star Arrows (+1d6 radiant; +2 Accuracy in darkness).

stone_hammer.name: Stone Hammer
stone_hammer.desc: A crude stone hammer. +2 Strength when equipped. Damage: 1d4

iron_mace.name: Iron Mace
iron_mace.desc: A solid iron mace. +3 Strength, +1 Physical Defence when equipped. Damage: 1d6

war_hammer.name: War Hammer
war_hammer.desc: A heavy war hammer. +4 Strength, -1 Speed. Damage: 1d10. GRANTS: Armor Pierce (−2 target Physical Defence for this attack).

blessed_mace.name: Blessed Mace
blessed_mace.desc: A mace blessed by divine power. +3 Strength, +1 Magic Power. Damage: 1d10. Holy damage vs undead. GRANTS: Holy Strike.

frost_hammer.name: Frost Hammer
frost_hammer.desc: A hammer of eternal ice. +4 Strength, +1 Magic Power. Damage: 1d10. Freezes enemies on impact. GRANTS: Freeze On Hit.

earth_hammer.name: Earth Hammer
earth_hammer.desc: A hammer imbued with earth magic. +4 Strength, +2 Physical Defence. Damage: 1d10. GRANTS: Earthquake (10ft burst — 2d6 earth; Knockdown on failed Speed save).

thunder_hammer.name: Thunder Hammer
thunder_hammer.desc: A hammer that roars with thunder. +5 Strength, +2 Magic Power. Damage: 1d12. GRANTS: Thunder Strike (+1d6 thunder; 40% Incapacitated for 1 turn).

titan_hammer.name: Titan's Hammer
titan_hammer.desc: The legendary hammer of titans. +6 Strength, +5 HP, -1 Speed. Damage: 2d8. GRANTS: Earth Shatter (+1d8 earth; −2 target Physical Defence until end of next turn).

void_crusher.name: Void Crusher
void_crusher.desc: A void-forged war hammer. +7 Strength, +3 Magic Power, -2 HP. Damage: 2d10. GRANTS: Void Impact (+1d6 void; push target 10ft on hit).

bronze_axe.name: Bronze Axe
bronze_axe.desc: A simple bronze axe. +2 Strength when equipped. Damage: 1d4

iron_axe.name: Iron Axe
iron_axe.desc: A sturdy iron axe. +3 Strength when equipped. Damage: 1d6

battle_axe.name: Battle Axe
battle_axe.desc: A brutal battle axe. +3 Strength, -1 Speed. Damage: 1d8. GRANTS: Cleave (on drop or crit: half rolled damage to one adjacent enemy).

double_axe.name: Double Axe
double_axe.desc: A double-headed axe. +4 Strength, -1 Speed. Damage: 1d10. GRANTS: Double Strike (two attack rolls with one action; second hit uses same modifiers).

demon_axe.name: Demon Axe
demon_axe.desc: A cursed demonic axe. +5 Strength, -1 Speed, -2 HP. Damage: 1d12. GRANTS: Lifesteal (heal half the damage this attack deals).

berserker_axe.name: Berserker Axe
berserker_axe.desc: An axe that fuels bloodlust. +5 Strength, +1 Speed, -1 HP. Damage: 1d10. GRANTS: Rage Mode (+2 Strength, +2 Speed, −1 Physical Defence for 8 turns).

executioner_axe.name: Executioner's Axe
executioner_axe.desc: A massive executioner's axe. +6 Strength, -2 Speed. Damage: 2d6. GRANTS: Execution (+1d6 damage vs targets below half HP).

chaos_axe.name: Chaos Axe
chaos_axe.desc: An axe of wild magic. +7 Strength, +2 Magic Power, -3 HP. Damage: 2d8. GRANTS: Chaos Strike (+1d6 random element — fire, ice, lightning, or void — each hit).

world_cleaver.name: World Cleaver
world_cleaver.desc: A world-shattering greataxe. +8 Strength, +2 Physical Defence, -3 Speed. Damage: 3d8. GRANTS: Reality Cut (once per scene: ignore all defence and cover; +2d6 force).

wooden_staff.name: Wooden Staff
wooden_staff.desc: A simple wooden staff. +1 Magic Power when equipped. Damage: 1d4

quarterstaff.name: Quarterstaff
quarterstaff.desc: A versatile wooden staff. +1 Strength, +1 Magic Power, +1 Physical Defence. Damage: 1d4

mystic_staff.name: Mystic Staff
mystic_staff.desc: A wooden staff carved with mystical runes. +2 Magic Power when equipped. Damage: 1d6. Enables staff skill bonuses.

crystal_staff.name: Crystal Staff
crystal_staff.desc: A staff topped with pure crystal. +3 Magic Power, +2 Stamina when equipped. Damage: 1d8

arcane_staff.name: Arcane Staff
arcane_staff.desc: A staff humming with arcane energy. +4 Magic Power, +2 Magical Defence. Damage: 1d10. Reduces mana costs. GRANTS: Mana Efficiency.

void_staff.name: Void Staff
void_staff.desc: A staff channeling dark energy. +4 Magic Power, +1 Magical Defence. Damage: 1d10. Drains enemy mana. GRANTS: Drain Mana.

elemental_staff.name: Elemental Staff
elemental_staff.desc: A staff attuned to all elements. +5 Magic Power, +3 Stamina. Damage: 1d12. Elemental spell mastery. GRANTS: Elemental Mastery.

cosmic_staff.name: Cosmic Staff
cosmic_staff.desc: A staff channeling cosmic forces. +6 Magic Power, +5 Stamina, +2 HP. Damage: 2d6. GRANTS: Cosmic Power (+4 Magic Power, +2 Magical Defence for 6 turns).

genesis_rod.name: Genesis Rod
genesis_rod.desc: Rod of creation. +7 Magic Power, +6 Stamina, +3 HP, +1 Speed. Damage: 2d8. GRANTS: Creation Magic (+3 Magic Power for 8 turns; minor objects or barriers — GM).

bronze_spear.name: Bronze Spear
bronze_spear.desc: A basic bronze spear. +1 Strength, +1 Physical Defence when equipped. Damage: 1d4

iron_spear.name: Iron Spear
iron_spear.desc: A sturdy iron spear. +2 Strength, +1 Physical Defence when equipped. Damage: 1d6

spear.name: Spear
spear.desc: A long spear. +2 Strength, +1 Physical Defence. Damage: 1d6. Extended reach.

halberd.name: Halberd
halberd.desc: A versatile halberd. +3 Strength, +2 Physical Defence, -1 Speed. Damage: 1d10. GRANTS: Reach (+5ft melee for 10 turns), Cleave (on drop/crit: half damage to one adjacent enemy).

pike.name: Pike
pike.desc: A long pike for formation fighting. +2 Strength, +3 Physical Defence, -1 Speed. Damage: 1d8. Extra damage vs mounted foes. GRANTS: Anti Cavalry.

glaive.name: Glaive
glaive.desc: An elegant glaive. +4 Strength, +1 Speed, +1 Physical Defence. Damage: 1d12. Sweeping attack patterns. GRANTS: Sweeping Strikes.

dragon_lance.name: Dragon Lance
dragon_lance.desc: A lance forged to slay dragons. +4 Strength, +3 Physical Defence, +2 Magic Power. Damage: 2d6. GRANTS: Dragon Slayer (+2 Accuracy and +1d6 vs dragons and draconic foes).

infinity_spear.name: Infinity Spear
infinity_spear.desc: A legendary reach spear. +5 Strength, +4 Physical Defence, +3 Magic Power, +1 Speed. Damage: 2d8. GRANTS: Infinite Reach (melee attacks reach 30ft for 3 turns).

reality_piercer.name: Reality Piercer
reality_piercer.desc: A dimension-piercing spear. +6 Strength, +5 Physical Defence, +4 Magic Power, +2 Speed. Damage: 2d10. GRANTS: Dimension Pierce (once per scene: ignore barriers and 6 total defence).

cloth_robes.name: Cloth Robes
cloth_robes.desc: Simple cloth robes. +1 Magic Power when equipped.

leather_armor.name: Leather Armor
leather_armor.desc: Basic leather protection. +2 Physical Defence when equipped.

studded_leather.name: Studded Leather
studded_leather.desc: Leather armor with metal studs. +3 Physical Defence, -1 Speed.

chain_mail.name: Chain Mail
chain_mail.desc: Interlocked metal rings. +4 Physical Defence, -1 Speed.

scale_mail.name: Scale Mail
scale_mail.desc: Overlapping metal scales. +4 Physical Defence, +1 Magical Defence, -1 Speed.

plate_mail.name: Plate Mail
plate_mail.desc: Heavy steel armor. +5 Physical Defence, -1 Speed. Reduces incoming damage. GRANTS: Damage Reduction.

knight_armor.name: Knight's Armor
knight_armor.desc: Full plate armor of a knight. +6 Physical Defence, +1 Magical Defence, -2 Speed. GRANTS: Damage Reduction.

mage_robes.name: Mage Robes
mage_robes.desc: Enchanted robes. +4 Magical Defence, +2 Magic Power. Restores stamina over time. GRANTS: Mana Regeneration.

fire_robes.name: Fire Robes
fire_robes.desc: Robes woven with fire magic. +3 Magical Defence, +3 Magic Power. Immune to fire damage. GRANTS: Fire resistance 25% (quarter fire damage); Ice and Water weakness 200% (double damage)

ice_armor.name: Ice Armor
ice_armor.desc: Armor made of magical ice. +3 Physical Defence, +3 Magical Defence, -1 Speed. Freezes attackers. GRANTS: Ice resistance 25% (quarter ice damage); Fire and Lightning weakness 200% (double damage)

shadow_cloak.name: Shadow Cloak
shadow_cloak.desc: A cloak woven from shadows. +2 Speed, +2 Magical Defence. Enhanced stealth.

dragon_scale_armor.name: Dragon Scale Armor
dragon_scale_armor.desc: Armor crafted from ancient dragon scales. +5 Physical Defence, +4 Magical Defence, +5 HP. GRANTS: Fire Immunity, Damage Reduction.

void_armor.name: Void Armor
void_armor.desc: Armor from the void realm. +3 Physical Defence, +6 Magical Defence, +2 Magic Power, -3 HP. GRANTS: Spell Absorption (once while active: negate one spell targeting you; regain its Stamina cost).

celestial_robes.name: Celestial Robes
celestial_robes.desc: Robes blessed by celestial beings. +5 Magical Defence, +4 Magic Power, +3 HP, +3 Stamina. GRANTS: Light Aura, Mana Regeneration, Regeneration.

power_ring.name: Ring of Power
power_ring.desc: A simple enchanted ring. +1 Strength, +1 Magic Power when worn.

ring_of_speed.name: Ring of Speed
ring_of_speed.desc: A ring that quickens movement. +2 Speed. Grants extra actions. GRANTS: Haste.

ring_of_protection.name: Ring of Protection
ring_of_protection.desc: A protective ring. +2 Physical Defence, +2 Magical Defence.

ring_of_fire.name: Ring of Fire
ring_of_fire.desc: A ring wreathed in flames. +3 Magic Power. Fire immunity and burning aura. GRANTS: Fire resistance 50% (half fire damage); Ice weakness 200% (double ice damage)

ring_of_ice.name: Ring of Ice
ring_of_ice.desc: A ring of eternal frost. +3 Magic Power, +1 Magical Defence. Frost aura. GRANTS: Ice resistance 50% (half ice damage); Fire weakness 200% (double fire damage)

ring_of_storms.name: Ring of Storms
ring_of_storms.desc: A ring crackling with electricity. +2 Magic Power, +2 Speed. Lightning attacks. GRANTS: Lightning resistance 50% (half lightning damage); Earth weakness 200% (double earth damage)

ring_of_shadows.name: Ring of Shadows
ring_of_shadows.desc: A ring that bends light. +3 Speed, +1 Magic Power. Can become invisible. GRANTS: Invisibility.

speed_boots.name: Boots of Speed
speed_boots.desc: Enchanted boots that enhance mobility. +3 Speed. Grants extra movement in combat.

boots_of_stealth.name: Boots of Stealth
boots_of_stealth.desc: Soft-soled boots. +2 Speed. Move without making sound. GRANTS: Silent Movement.

iron_boots.name: Iron Boots
iron_boots.desc: Heavy iron boots. +3 Physical Defence, -1 Speed. Cannot be knocked down. GRANTS: Immovable.

winged_boots.name: Winged Boots
winged_boots.desc: Boots with ethereal wings. +4 Speed. Grants limited flight ability.

health_amulet.name: Amulet of Health
health_amulet.desc: A life-enhancing amulet. +5 HP, +3 Stamina. Slowly regenerates health. GRANTS: Regeneration.

amulet_of_mana.name: Amulet of Mana
amulet_of_mana.desc: An amulet pulsing with magical energy. +3 Magic Power, +5 Stamina. Restores mana over time. GRANTS: Mana Regeneration.

pendant_of_wisdom.name: Pendant of Wisdom
pendant_of_wisdom.desc: A pendant containing ancient knowledge. +2 Magic Power, +3 Magical Defence. GRANTS: Spell Resistance.

amulet_of_earth.name: Amulet of Earth
amulet_of_earth.desc: An amulet of solid stone. +3 Physical Defence, +3 HP. Stone skin protection. GRANTS: Earth resistance 50% (half earth damage); Wind weakness 200% (double wind damage)

amulet_of_shadows.name: Amulet of Shadows
amulet_of_shadows.desc: An amulet wreathed in darkness. +3 Speed, +2 Magical Defence. Shadow stealth. GRANTS: Darkness resistance 50% (half darkness damage); Light weakness 200% (double light damage)

amulet_of_light.name: Amulet of Light
amulet_of_light.desc: An amulet glowing with holy light. +2 Magic Power, +3 Magical Defence. Radiant aura, extra damage vs undead. GRANTS: Light resistance 50% (half light damage); Darkness weakness 200% (double darkness damage)

cloak_of_elvenkind.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
cloak_of_elvenkind.desc: An elven cloak. +2 Speed, +2 Magical Defence. Enhanced stealth and nature resistance.

cloak_of_displacement.name: Cloak of Displacement
cloak_of_displacement.desc: A shimmering cloak. +1 Speed, +2 Physical Defence, +2 Magical Defence. Creates mirror images. GRANTS: Mirror Image.

lucky_coin.name: Lucky Coin
lucky_coin.desc: An ancient lucky coin. Increases critical hit chance and general luck. GRANTS: Critical Chance, Luck.

crystal_monocle.name: Crystal Monocle
crystal_monocle.desc: A monocle made of pure crystal. +2 Magic Power. See magical auras and identify items. GRANTS: Magic Sight, Identify.

gauntlets_of_ogre_power.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
gauntlets_of_ogre_power.desc: Massive gauntlets. +4 Strength, -1 Speed. Can crush armor and weapons.

belt_of_giant_strength.name: Belt of Giant Strength
belt_of_giant_strength.desc: A belt crafted by giants. +3 Strength, +3 HP. Increases carrying capacity.

headband_of_intellect.name: Headband of Intellect
headband_of_intellect.desc: A scholarly headband. +3 Magic Power, +2 Stamina. Remember more spells. GRANTS: Spell Memory.

eagle_eye_pendant.name: Eagle Eye Pendant
eagle_eye_pendant.desc: A pendant carved with an eagle's eye. +2 Accuracy. See targets more clearly. GRANTS: Keen Sight.

marksman_gloves.name: Marksman's Gloves
marksman_gloves.desc: Precision gloves worn by expert marksmen. +1 Accuracy, +1 Speed. Reduces hand tremor. GRANTS: Steady Hands.

precision_scope.name: Precision Scope
precision_scope.desc: A masterwork telescopic scope. +3 Accuracy, -1 Speed. See and hit distant targets. GRANTS: Long Range Sight.

hunter_focus_charm.name: Hunter's Focus Charm
hunter_focus_charm.desc: A charm that sharpens focus and awareness. +1 Accuracy, +1 Physical Defence. GRANTS: Concentration while sustaining a channeled spell or toggle.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.desc: A simple wooden shield for the off-hand. +1 Physical Defence. Requires a one-handed main weapon.

iron_shield.name: Iron Shield
iron_shield.desc: A sturdy iron shield. +2 Physical Defence. 1 enchant slot.

apprentice_spell_tome.name: Apprentice Spell Tome
apprentice_spell_tome.desc: A pocket spellbook for the off-hand. +1 Magic Power, +1 Magical Defence.

travel_lute.name: Travel Lute
travel_lute.desc: A light lute for the off-hand. +1 Stamina. Vocals work without it — hover for Musician song bonuses.

round_buckler.name: Round Buckler
round_buckler.desc: A small round shield for the off-hand. +1 Physical Defence, +1 Speed. Bonus to parrying. GRANTS: Parry Bonus.

steel_kite_shield.name: Steel Kite Shield
steel_kite_shield.desc: A broad steel kite shield. +3 Physical Defence, −1 Speed. 1 enchant slot.

arcane_focus_orb.name: Arcane Focus Orb
arcane_focus_orb.desc: A crystal orb for channelling spells in the off-hand. +1 Magic Power, +1 Accuracy.

scholars_grimoire.name: Scholar's Grimoire
scholars_grimoire.desc: A well-worn spellbook for the off-hand. +2 Magic Power, +1 Magical Defence. 1 enchant slot.

hand_drum.name: Hand Drum
hand_drum.desc: A compact drum for the off-hand. +1 Stamina. Vocals work without it — hover for Musician song bonuses.

war_horn.name: War Horn
war_horn.desc: A brass horn for rallying allies. +2 Stamina. Vocals work without it — hover for Musician song bonuses.

pilgrims_holy_symbol.name: Pilgrim's Holy Symbol
pilgrims_holy_symbol.desc: A blessed symbol for the off-hand. +1 Magical Defence. GRANTS: +1 vs fear and mind control while worn.

torch_brace.name: Torch Brace
torch_brace.desc: A hooded torch mount for the off-hand. +1 Accuracy. Lights the way — the GM may waive darkness penalties nearby.

heater_shield.name: Heater Shield
heater_shield.desc: A tall heater shield for the off-hand. +2 Physical Defence, +1 Magical Defence.

warden_targe.name: Warden's Targe
warden_targe.desc: A light strapped shield for skirmishers. +2 Physical Defence, +1 Speed. GRANTS: Flexible Defense.

tower_guard_shield.name: Tower Guard Shield
tower_guard_shield.desc: A heavy tower shield. +4 Physical Defence, −2 Speed. 2 enchant slots.

mirror_shield.name: Mirror Shield
mirror_shield.desc: A polished shield that catches and returns blows. +2 Physical Defence, +1 Magical Defence. 1 enchant slot. GRANTS: Reflect Damage.

aegis_of_dawn.name: Aegis of Dawn
aegis_of_dawn.desc: A sun-blessed shield for champions. +4 Physical Defence, +2 Magical Defence. 2 enchant slots. GRANTS: Magic Barrier.

novice_wand.name: Novice Wand
novice_wand.desc: A simple wand for the off-hand. +1 Magic Power.

star_chart_folio.name: Star Chart Folio
star_chart_folio.desc: Astrological charts bound for travel. +1 Magic Power, +2 Accuracy. GRANTS: Keen Sight.

mages_codex.name: Mage's Codex
mages_codex.desc: A master reference for battle-casting. +3 Magic Power, +2 Magical Defence. 1 enchant slot. GRANTS: Concentration.

void_scripture.name: Void Scripture
void_scripture.desc: Forbidden pages that bend time at the edge of vision. +3 Magic Power, +2 Speed. 2 enchant slots.

wooden_flute.name: Wooden Flute
wooden_flute.desc: A simple flute for the off-hand. +1 Stamina. Vocals work without it — hover for Musician song bonuses.

silver_bells.name: Silver Bells
silver_bells.desc: Tiny bells on a wrist strap. +1 Stamina, +1 Magic Power. Vocals work without them — hover for Musician song bonuses.

singing_bowl.name: Singing Bowl
singing_bowl.desc: A handheld bowl that rings clear and long. +1 Stamina, +1 Magical Defence. Vocals work without it — hover for Musician song bonuses.

battle_lute.name: Battle Lute
battle_lute.desc: A reinforced lute built for the front line. +2 Stamina, +1 Magic Power. 1 enchant slot. Vocals work without it — hover for Musician song bonuses.

symphony_harp.name: Hand Harp
symphony_harp.desc: A portable harp for the off-hand. +2 Stamina, +2 Magic Power. 1 enchant slot. Vocals work without it — hover for Musician song bonuses.

trail_compass.name: Trail Compass
trail_compass.desc: A brass compass for the off-hand. +1 Speed, +1 Accuracy.

component_pouch.name: Component Pouch
component_pouch.desc: A belt pouch of spell reagents for the off-hand. +1 Magic Power. GRANTS: Concentration.

druidic_totem.name: Druidic Totem
druidic_totem.desc: A carved spirit totem for the off-hand. +1 HP, +1 Magical Defence.

iron_censer.name: Iron Censer
iron_censer.desc: A swinging censer of blessed incense. +1 Magical Defence. GRANTS: Turn Unholy (warded area — undead hesitate to enter).

lantern_shield.name: Lantern Shield
lantern_shield.desc: A buckler with a built-in lantern slot. +1 Physical Defence, +1 Accuracy. Lights the way in the off-hand.

plague_ward_amulet.name: Plague Ward Amulet
plague_ward_amulet.desc: A warding amulet on a wrist chain. +1 Magical Defence, +1 HP. GRANTS: Plague Ward.

spell_scarab.name: Spell Scarab
spell_scarab.desc: An enchanted beetle talisman for the off-hand. +2 Magic Power, +1 Magical Defence. 1 enchant slot.

lucky_charm.name: Lucky Charm
lucky_charm.desc: A rabbit's foot on a cord — probably lucky. +1 Speed.

apple.name: Apple
apple.desc: A fresh apple. Restores 2 HP when consumed. GRANTS: Heal 2.

bread.name: Bread
bread.desc: A simple loaf of bread. Restores 5 HP when consumed. GRANTS: Heal 5.

cheese.name: Cheese
cheese.desc: Aged cheese. Restores 3 HP and 2 Stamina when consumed. GRANTS: Heal 3, Restore Stamina 2.

meat_ration.name: Meat Ration
meat_ration.desc: Preserved meat. Restores 8 HP and temporarily boosts Strength by 1 for 5 turns. GRANTS: Heal 8, Temp Strength (potency 1, 5 turns).

wine.name: Wine
wine.desc: Fine wine. Restores 5 Stamina and temporarily boosts Magic Power by 1 for 3 turns. GRANTS: Restore Stamina 5, Temp Magic (potency 1, 3 turns).

health_potion.name: Health Potion
health_potion.desc: Restores 25 HP when consumed. GRANTS: Heal 25.

stamina_potion.name: Stamina Potion
stamina_potion.desc: Restores 15 Stamina when consumed. GRANTS: Restore Stamina 15.

greater_health_potion.name: Greater Health Potion
greater_health_potion.desc: A more potent healing potion. Restores 50 HP when consumed. GRANTS: Heal 50.

superior_stamina_potion.name: Superior Stamina Potion
superior_stamina_potion.desc: A potent energy potion. Restores 30 Stamina when consumed. GRANTS: Restore Stamina 30.

strength_elixir.name: Elixir of Strength
strength_elixir.desc: Temporarily increases Strength by 3 for 10 turns. GRANTS: Temp Strength (potency 3, 10 turns).

speed_elixir.name: Elixir of Speed
speed_elixir.desc: Temporarily increases Speed by 3 for 8 turns. GRANTS: Temp Speed (potency 3, 8 turns).

magic_elixir.name: Elixir of Magic
magic_elixir.desc: Temporarily increases Magic Power by 3 for 10 turns. GRANTS: Temp Magic (potency 3, 10 turns).

defense_elixir.name: Elixir of Defense
defense_elixir.desc: Temporarily increases both defenses by 4 for 12 turns. GRANTS: Temp Defense (potency 4, 12 turns).

invisibility_potion.name: Potion of Invisibility
invisibility_potion.desc: Grants invisibility for 5 turns. Enemies cannot target you. GRANTS: Invisibility (5 turns).

fire_resistance_potion.name: Fire Resistance Potion
fire_resistance_potion.desc: Grants immunity to fire damage for 10 turns. GRANTS: Fire Immunity (10 turns).

ice_resistance_potion.name: Ice Resistance Potion
ice_resistance_potion.desc: Grants immunity to cold damage for 10 turns. GRANTS: Cold Immunity (10 turns).

berserker_potion.name: Berserker Potion
berserker_potion.desc: Enter a berserker rage! +5 Strength, +2 Speed, -2 Defense for 8 turns. GRANTS: Temp Strength (potency 5, 8 turns), Temp Speed (potency 2, 8 turns), Temp Defense (potency −2, 8 turns).

scroll_of_fireball.name: Scroll of Fireball
scroll_of_fireball.desc: A magical scroll. Allows casting Fireball spell once, even without magic skills. GRANTS: Cast Fireball.

scroll_of_healing.name: Scroll of Healing
scroll_of_healing.desc: A divine scroll. Restores 40 HP and removes poison effects. GRANTS: Heal 40, Remove Poison.

scroll_of_teleport.name: Scroll of Teleport
scroll_of_teleport.desc: A dimensional scroll. Instantly teleport to a safe location, escaping combat.

phoenix_feather.name: Phoenix Feather
phoenix_feather.desc: Legendary feather. Consume: full heal, remove all debuffs, permanent fire immunity.

dragon_heart.name: Dragon Heart
dragon_heart.desc: Consume: permanently +5 max HP, +2 Strength, and Dragon Breath (30ft cone — 3d6 fire; 75% Burn on each target).

elixir_of_immortality.name: Elixir of Immortality
elixir_of_immortality.desc: Consume: permanently +1 Strength, Magic Power, Accuracy, and Speed; restore 1 HP at the start of each turn.

lockpick_set.name: Lockpick Set
lockpick_set.desc: A set of fine lockpicks. Can open locked doors and chests. GRANTS: Unlock Doors.

rope.name: Rope
rope.desc: 50 feet of sturdy rope. Useful for climbing and exploration. GRANTS: Climb Assistance.

torch.name: Torch
torch.desc: A burning torch. Provides light and can be used as a weapon. GRANTS: Light Source, Fire Damage.

holy_water.name: Holy Water
holy_water.desc: Blessed water. Deals extra damage to undead and purifies corruption. GRANTS: Undead Damage, Purify.

iron_ore.name: Iron Ore
iron_ore.desc: Raw iron ore. Used for crafting iron weapons and armor.

wood.name: Wood
wood.desc: Sturdy wood. Used for crafting wooden weapons and tools.

leather.name: Leather
leather.desc: Tanned leather. Used for crafting light armor and accessories.

herbs.name: Medicinal Herbs
herbs.desc: Fresh medicinal herbs. Used for brewing potions.

crystal.name: Mana Crystal
crystal.desc: A crystal charged with magical energy. Used for enchanting.

drake_scales.name: Drake Scales
drake_scales.desc: Tough scales shed from a drake. Used for high-grade smithing and cooking recipes.

reinforcement_studs.name: Reinforcement Studs
reinforcement_studs.desc: Heavy metal studs used to reinforce armour and shields.

reflective_scales.name: Reflective Scales
reflective_scales.desc: Mirror-bright scales used for defensive gear and warding enchantments.

titan_bones.name: Titan Bones
titan_bones.desc: Ancient giant bone fragments used in legendary armour and relic crafting.

phase_essence.name: Phase Essence
phase_essence.desc: Unstable essence that slips between spaces. Used in stealth, void, and phase recipes.

storm_organ.name: Storm Organ
storm_organ.desc: A volatile organ that crackles with stored storm energy.

elemental_core.name: Elemental Core
elemental_core.desc: A condensed core of mixed elemental power. Used in advanced alchemy, cooking, and enchanting.

soul_essence.name: Soul Essence
soul_essence.desc: A captured trace of spiritual energy used in high-tier enchantments.

divine_essence.name: Divine Essence
divine_essence.desc: Sacred essence used in relics, divine runes, and ultimate archaeology recipes.

ghost_moss.name: Ghost Moss
ghost_moss.desc: Pale moss that grows where the veil is thin. Used in ethereal herbalism recipes.

flame_petals.name: Flame Petals
flame_petals.desc: Warm petals from a fire-bloom. Used for phoenix-themed herbalism recipes.

cosmic_dust.name: Cosmic Dust
cosmic_dust.desc: Glittering stardust used in the rarest cosmic herbalism recipes.
